_schema.description: Mahadashas are the planetary ruling periods in Vimshottari Dasha system (total 120 years). At any time, ONE planet rules the person's life. This is the single most important predictive factor in Vedic astrology.
_schema.usage: When a user asks 'how is this year' or 'what is happening in my life', interpret based on current Mahadasha + Antardasha.

emotional_patterns: intense focus on identity and self-worth
pride and self-respect rise to surface
relationship_patterns: may feel emotionally distant or dominant in relationships
father or authority figure plays significant role
career_patterns: potential for leadership roles, government work, recognition
sun.tone: intense, identity-focused, sometimes harsh but clarifying
sun.general_advice: A short but powerful period of identity development. Use it to build self-respect without arrogance.

emotional_patterns: needs emotional safety more than ever
relationship_patterns: marriage often occurs during Moon dasha
career_patterns: fields involving care, water, hospitality, real estate
moon.general_advice: A decade of emotional unfolding. Family and feelings dominate. Marriage, motherhood, public success possible.

career_patterns: military, police, engineering, surgery, sports favored
mars.general_advice: Action takes precedence. Anger must be managed. Bold moves bring results but also conflict.

emotional_patterns: feeling of dissatisfaction even with success
confusion about what one truly wants
fear and anxiety surface from the subconscious
relationship_patterns: attraction to foreign, unconventional, or socially different partners
may have affairs or unconventional arrangements
rahu.general_advice: The longest dasha and the most disorienting. Worldly success is possible but inner peace requires confronting illusions. Be alert to scams, addictions, and obsessions.

emotional_patterns: sense of optimism and meaning grows
relationship_patterns: elders and gurus play important role
career_patterns: growth in teaching, law, finance, counseling, spirituality
jupiter.general_advice: Considered the most fortunate dasha. Doors open. Wisdom grows. Use this period to learn, teach, marry, build wealth, and deepen spiritual practice.

relationship_patterns: delays in marriage or relationship commitments
separation, distance, or duty-based relationships common
career_patterns: rewards come through sustained effort, not luck
saturn.general_advice: The longest test of the soul. Nothing comes easy but everything earned is deeply lasting. Discipline, patience, and acceptance are the keys. Avoid shortcuts.

career_patterns: writing, teaching, business, tech, media, accounting flourish
mercury.general_advice: A versatile and youthful period. Learn, write, network, build businesses. Avoid scattering energy across too many things.

emotional_patterns: feeling of detachment from worldly matters
sense of disillusionment with what once mattered
career_patterns: loss of interest in current work
drawn to research, occult, healing, monastic paths
ketu.general_advice: A period of letting go. Worldly losses are spiritual gains. Don't grip the past. Spiritual practice yields the deepest results during this time.

career_patterns: arts, music, fashion, design, beauty industry, entertainment, luxury goods
financial gains through women, art, vehicles
venus.general_advice: The longest dasha and full of worldly pleasures. Wealth, love, and beauty flow. Be careful not to lose yourself in indulgence.
